sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Shares Down 3% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) shares dropped 3% on Friday, trading below moving averages despite a recent earnings beat. The stock faces mixed catalysts, including a potential easing of capital rules and stretched bearish options activity that could signal a rebound, alongside risks like insider selling and macroeconomic headwinds such as a stronger dollar and market volatility. While Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus, the current price performance raises questions about its immediate outlook.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) Trading Down 2% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) shares dropped 2% during Friday's mid-day trading session, reaching a low of $27.02 before closing at $27.03, with trading volume significantly below average. Despite recent positive news regarding late-stage clinical trials for a Lyme vaccine and oncology treatments, as well as several analyst upgrades, concerns over the safety of the company's high dividend yield and cautious remarks from commentators like Jim Cramer appear to be weighing on investor sentiment. Analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating on the stock with a price target of $28.19.

feed.title: IB Acquisition Extends Business Combination Deadline to September 2026
feed.summary: IB Acquisition Corp. (IBAC) has extended its SPAC merger deadline to September 28, 2026, after receiving stockholder approval. The amendment to its Investment Management Trust Agreement also updates termination provisions and clarifies that trust funds will not be used for dissolution expenses. Additionally, shareholders approved changes to the company's articles of incorporation to align the new deadline and tighten rules regarding the release of trust funds and public shareholder rights.

feed.title: How Coca-Cola’s AI-Focused CEO Transition At Coca-Cola (KO) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Coca-Cola's recent CEO transition, with Henrique Braun taking over and a renewed emphasis on AI and generative technologies, signals a shift in the company's operational strategy. While core investment narratives around emerging markets and fairlife expansion remain, the AI focus influences efficiency gains and data treatment, but doesn't remove ongoing risks from health and regulatory pressures on sugary drinks. Investors are encouraged to consider these factors alongside the expected revenue and earnings growth projections for Coca-Cola.

feed.title: Federal Judge Rules Colgate Must Face Lawsuits Over Children’s Mouthwash Packaging
feed.summary: A federal judge in Chicago has ruled that Colgate-Palmolive must defend against two class-action lawsuits alleging that the company's colorful children's mouthwash packaging misleads parents about product safety for young children. The judge dismissed similar claims regarding toothpaste but found that the mouthwash labels could confuse consumers about age-appropriate use of fluoride rinses, especially concerning federal health guidelines against fluoride for children under six. This ruling could prompt manufacturers to re-evaluate their marketing strategies for children's oral care products, amid similar legal challenges faced by other companies.

feed.title: CSG Named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Journey Analytics
feed.summary: CSG has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Customer Journey Analytics & Orchestration. This acknowledgement highlights CSG's vision and ability to execute in helping businesses deliver consistent, personalized experiences using their Xponent platform. The platform aids in real-time personalization, fixing customer experience issues, and has shown significant financial impact for clients, such as a US bank that reduced inbound calls and fraud cases while tripling SMS responsiveness.

feed.title: HomesToLife Sets April 10 AGM to Vote on Director Slate, Auditor and Final Dividend
feed.summary: HomesToLife Ltd (HTLM) will hold its Annual General Meeting on April 10, 2026, where shareholders will vote on re-electing directors, ratifying CLA Global TS Public Accounting Corporation as auditor, and approving a proposed final cash dividend of US$0.065 per ordinary share for 2025. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates HTLM as Neutral, noting improved fundamentals for FY2025 such as profitability recovery and positive free cash flow, but also weak technicals and high volatility. The company, based in Singapore, emphasizes ongoing capital returns and governance continuity.

feed.title: More layoffs at T-Mobile: Company confirms it’s ‘further aligning’ IT org
feed.summary: T-Mobile has confirmed unspecified layoffs this week, stating it is "further aligning" its IT organization to support future growth and innovation. This follows a previous round of layoffs in Washington state less than two months ago, which affected 393 workers across various levels. Despite these cuts, T-Mobile reported strong financial performance in 2025, with increased service revenue and net income.

feed.title: HEALTHEQUITY (HQY) CTO adds shares through RSU grant and vesting
feed.summary: HEALTHEQUITY's EVP and CTO, Elimelech Rosner, reported new stock-based compensation activity. He received a grant of 19,704 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) with a staggered vesting schedule and also saw 40,903 RSUs vest into common stock on March 25, 2026. Following these transactions, Rosner now directly holds 104,275 shares of HEALTHEQUITY common stock.

feed.title: HealthEquity (NASDAQ: HQY) CFO granted 27,283 stock units
feed.summary: HealthEquity's EVP & CFO, James M. Lucania, was granted 27,283 restricted stock units (RSUs) as compensation, bringing his total direct holdings to 111,849 shares. These RSUs vest 25% on April 1, 2027, with the remaining shares vesting quarterly over the subsequent twelve quarters. This transaction was not an open-market purchase but an equity award recorded at a $0.00 purchase price.

feed.title: Seasonal storage advice sees Public Storage stock edging lower amid persistent bearish trend
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) has published seasonal storage advice, but its stock continues a bearish trend, trading 0.75% lower today. Technical indicators suggest sustained downward pressure, with the stock significantly below key moving averages. The price is expected to consolidate between $262 and $272 in the coming week, with a low probability of a short-term sustained price increase.

feed.title: HealthEquity (HQY) CEO receives 72,754 restricted stock units award
feed.summary: HealthEquity, Inc. CEO Scott Cutler was awarded 72,754 restricted stock units as compensation, not through an open-market purchase. These units, which represent a contingent right to one share of common stock each, will vest in a staggered schedule, starting with 25% on April 1, 2027, and subsequently 6.25% each quarter for the following twelve quarters. Following this grant, Cutler directly owns a total of 182,574 shares of HealthEquity common stock.

feed.title: Truist banker alleges manager harassed, fired him for saying no
feed.summary: A former Truist Bank relationship banker, Kenneth Ehiogie, has filed a lawsuit alleging he was sexually harassed and then fired by his regional manager, Jared Alvis, after rejecting Alvis's advances. The lawsuit claims Alvis made unwanted physical contact and propositions, culminating in a termination for an "unspecified policy violation" shortly after Ehiogie declined his manager's romantic overtures at an off-site meeting. The case highlights crucial issues for HR leaders regarding harassment investigations and termination decisions.

feed.title: Yu Yong, Genelux SVP, sells $2192 in GNLX stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Yu Yong, SVP of Clinical Development at Genelux Corp (NASDAQ:GNLX), sold 906 shares for $2.42 each, totaling $2192, to cover taxes on restricted stock units. This transaction occurred amidst a 39% year-to-date decline in GNLX shares, which are near their 52-week low. The company, with a market cap of $117.59 million, has a "WEAK" financial health score and is burning cash quickly.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc Stock: Leading U.S. Homebuilder Faces Housing Market Headwinds Amid Earnings Anticipation
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc, the largest U.S. homebuilder, is navigating affordability challenges and interest rate pressures. Investors are closely watching its upcoming Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings for insights into demand trends and strategic positioning. The company's market position benefits from housing shortages, but faces headwinds from elevated interest rates and high construction costs, though its focus on entry-level homes and diversified portfolio provide resilience.

feed.title: Upstream Bio (NASDAQ: UPB) establishes $150M at-the-market stock program
feed.summary: Upstream Bio (NASDAQ: UPB) has established an at-the-market (ATM) equity program, allowing it to offer and sell up to $150 million worth of its common stock through Leerink Partners LLC. This program provides the company with flexible access to capital, enabling sales of shares over time based on market conditions. Leerink Partners will receive a commission of up to 3.0% of the gross proceeds from these sales, and neither party is obligated to sell a minimum amount of shares.

feed.title: BCE (TSX: BCE) to sell land mobile radio services business to Motorola
feed.summary: BCE Inc., through its subsidiary Bell Mobility, is selling its Canadian land mobile radio networks services business to Motorola Solutions Canada Networks Inc. for CAD $675 million. The transaction is expected to close in Q4 2026, pending regulatory approvals. Bell will continue to be an important service delivery partner for Motorola Solutions Canada post-acquisition.

feed.title: [ARS] ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing (Form ARS) by Essex Property Trust, Inc. (ESS) on March 27, 2026. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides a company overview including its market cap, industry, and recent news and other SEC filings.

feed.title: HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) director exercises options, holds 84,634 shares
feed.summary: HP Inc. director Charles V. Bergh exercised stock options to acquire 48,544 shares of HP common stock at an exercise price of $11.45 per share. These options were granted on May 5, 2016, and vested one year later. Following the exercise, Bergh directly holds 84,634 HP common shares, with no sales reported in this filing.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc. stock: Cloud networking leader faces volatility amid AI-driven growth opportunities
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc. experienced a recent sharp decline in share price, yet analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, anticipating significant upside. The company, a leader in cloud networking solutions for data centers and AI infrastructure, is poised for long-term growth despite short-term volatility. Its strong financial performance, competitive positioning, and alignment with AI and cloud megatrends make it an attractive option for growth-oriented North American investors, though risks like market volatility and customer concentration exist.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper declares JDE Peet's takeover offer unconditional
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper announced its takeover offer for JDE Peet's N.V. has been declared unconditional after 96.22% of shares were tendered by the March 27, 2026 deadline, representing an aggregate value of €14.86 billion. Settlement is scheduled for April 1, 2026, and a post-closing acceptance period for untendered shares will run from March 30 to April 13, 2026. Keurig Dr Pepper intends to delist JDE Peet's shares from Euronext Amsterdam and initiate statutory buy-out proceedings for remaining shares.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. to Host Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on ...
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) announced it will host a webcast of its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call on April 23, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central time. The webcast will be accessible via their investor relations website. CenterPoint Energy is an energy delivery company serving over 7 million metered customers across multiple states.

feed.title: IBRX DEADLINE ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds ImmunityBio (IBRX) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 26, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of ImmunityBio (IBRX) about the May 26, 2026 deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that ImmunityBio and its executives made false and misleading statements regarding Anktiva's capabilities, leading to investor damages when the truth emerged. Investors who purchased ImmunityBio securities between January 19, 2026, and March 24, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal options.

feed.title: Globant calls shareholders to Luxembourg meeting on April 28
feed.summary: Globant (NYSE: GLOB) has announced that its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders will take place on April 28, 2026, at its registered office in Luxembourg. The company has made the convening notice, agenda, proxy form, and other relevant meeting materials available on its investor relations website. This announcement follows a strong operational period for Globant, including robust Q4 2025 financial results and strategic AI-focused partnerships.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy will webcast its first-quarter 2026 call on April 23
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) announced it will webcast its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call on April 23, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Central / 8:00 a.m. Eastern. The company, which serves over 7 million customers and manages substantial assets, expects the call to follow its typical pattern of routine investor communications with potentially modest stock price movements. Investors can access the webcast and replay via the company's official investor website.

feed.title: Icon Energy Corp (ICON) CFO Psachos Dennis files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Icon Energy Corp (ICON) Chief Financial Officer Psachos Dennis has filed an initial Form 3, which is a statement of beneficial ownership. This filing identifies him as an officer of the company but does not report any insider transactions or derivative positions. The SEC Form 3 document indicates no beneficially owned securities and serves solely to establish his reporting status.

feed.title: Confluent (CFLT) taken private by IBM subsidiary; Form 15 filed
feed.summary: Confluent, Inc. (CFLT) has filed a Form 15, certifying the termination of its registration under Section 12(g) and the suspension of its reporting duties following its acquisition. An IBM subsidiary, Corvo Merger Sub, Inc., merged with Confluent on March 17, 2026, converting Confluent into a private corporation. This action ends Confluent's obligation to file periodic reports with the SEC.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) CEO receives large RSU and PSU grants
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.'s President and CEO, John Chidsey, was granted significant equity awards, including 967,254 restricted share units (RSUs) and 1,172,638 performance-based restricted share units (PSUs). The RSUs vest in four annual installments from 2027 to 2030, contingent on continued employment, while the PSUs are tied to the company's total shareholder return compound annual growth rate through December 31, 2029, and also require continued employment. These grants are compensation-related and not open-market purchases, as detailed in a recent SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: 5.00% Callable Notes Due 2030 — Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS)
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs is issuing 5.00% callable fixed-rate notes due January 17, 2030, with interest payable semiannually. The company has the option to redeem the notes quarterly starting October 17, 2026, at par plus accrued interest. Investors who commit before the expected April 13, 2026 earnings release may withdraw their orders prior to the trade date.

feed.title: Harrow Health Expands Senior Notes Offering for Growth
feed.summary: Harrow Health issued an additional $50 million of 8.625% Senior Notes due 2030, integrating them into its existing $250 million note series. The private offering, completed on March 27, 2026, generated approximately $48.7 million in net proceeds, which Harrow Health plans to use for growth initiatives, product development, and strategic opportunities. Despite a "Sell" rating from one analyst and some financial headwinds, the company has a positive earnings-call outlook with strong 2026 revenue and EBITDA guidance.

feed.title: Core & Main names former American Water CEO to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Core & Main, Inc. has announced the appointment of M. Susan Hardwick, former CEO of American Water Works Company, Inc., to its board of directors and as a member of the talent and compensation committee. This change is effective April 1. Alongside this appointment, Stephen LeClair retired, and James Castellano was named chair of the board, showcasing a significant leadership reshuffle for the specialty distributor.

feed.title: Abbott subsidiary dodges whistleblower claim from fired remote worker
feed.summary: A federal appeals court ruled against a former remote employee of an Abbott subsidiary, Krishnan Ghosh, who claimed he was fired for whistleblowing about alleged anti-kickback violations. The Eighth Circuit Court found that Ghosh did not qualify for protection under Minnesota's whistleblower statute due to limited physical presence, and a choice-of-law clause in his employment agreement prevented a claim under Hawaii law. This decision highlights the complexities of whistleblower protections for remote workers across state lines and the importance of employment contract language.

feed.title: Ross Stores (ROST) dd's DISCOUNTS chief sells 5,506 shares at $213.40
feed.summary: Karen Sykes, President and CMO of dd's DISCOUNTS at Ross Stores (ROST), sold 5,506 shares of the company's common stock at an average price of $213.40 per share. This open-market transaction is described as a routine liquidity event, as Sykes still retains a substantial stake of 104,648 shares after the sale. The filing indicates no derivative activity or special arrangements for this transaction.

feed.title: [424B2] GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (GS) is offering callable fixed-rate notes due 2031, bearing an interest rate of 4.90% per annum, with interest payable semiannually. The notes, expected to be issued on April 17, 2026, can be redeemed by the issuer on quarterly dates starting April 17, 2028. This prospectus supplement details the specific terms, tax implications, and distribution plan for these new book-entry notes.

feed.title: Delaware First Health and the Centene Foundation Announce Grant Program Open Submission Period
feed.summary: Delaware First Health and the Centene Foundation have announced an open submission period for a grant program aimed at addressing social determinants of health in Delaware. Non-profit, community-based organizations and providers can apply for a share of $500,000 in funding to tackle issues like housing insecurity and transportation accessibility. Applications are due by May 25, 2026, with awards announced in September, and preference will be given to proposals focusing on housing instability or transportation.

feed.title: Health In Tech Raises $7 Million in PIPE Financing
feed.summary: Health In Tech Inc. (HIT) announced it has closed a $7 million private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing, issuing 5.6 million shares at $1.25 each. This capital infusion will be used to expand sales, advance technology and product development, and enhance market visibility by broadening its institutional investor base. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates HIT as Neutral, citing solid financial health but also high valuation and mixed technical conditions.

feed.title: Gilead: Why The 'Immune System Company' Pivot Is No Longer A Bargain (Downgrade) (GILD)
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences, Inc. has been downgraded to Hold after a significant rally, with its stock now deemed appropriately valued near $138/share. While its HIV franchise remains a core strength and Trodelvy's recent approval aids growth, the company faces challenges from cell therapy headwinds and a reliance on M&A for pipeline diversification, introducing execution and strategic risks. Comprehensive analyses suggest a realistic GILD trading range of $98–$209/share, with growth heavily dependent on future clinical successes.

feed.title: Colgate must face lawsuits over safety of mouth rinse for young children
feed.summary: A federal judge has ruled that Colgate-Palmolive must face two lawsuits alleging its mouth rinse packaging misleads parents about its safety for children under six. The consumers argue that bright packaging and flavors suggest the products are safe despite U.S. health authorities' warnings against fluoride rinses for young children. While a similar toothpaste lawsuit was dismissed, the judge found reasonable consumers might be confused by the mouth rinse labels.

feed.title: Highwoods Properties (NYSE:HIW) Sets New 12-Month Low - Here's Why
feed.summary: Highwoods Properties (NYSE:HIW) recently hit a new 52-week low of $20.45 after reporting disappointing quarterly earnings of $0.26 EPS against an expected $0.84 and missing revenue estimates. Despite price cuts from analysts, the company maintains a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $27.78 and offers a significant dividend yield of 9.7%. Institutional investors have shown mixed activity, with some increasing and others decreasing their holdings.

feed.title: -1.82% for Becton Dickinson stock as price nears 52-week low on persistent selling
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) stock dropped 1.82%, trading near its 52-week low of $153.76, indicating persistent selling pressure across all timeframes. Momentum indicators confirm a strong bearish trend with the price well below key moving averages. The expected weekly range is $153.50 to $156.80, with a high probability of further downside unless it breaks above $156.80.

feed.title: INTS: Promising clinical results and strong 2025 capital raise extend cash runway into Q2 2027
feed.summary: Intensity Therapeutics (INTS) successfully raised over $20 million in 2025, concluding the year with $11.9 million in cash and extending its financial runway into Q2 2027. Clinical studies for INT230-6 demonstrated encouraging efficacy and safety in metastatic and triple-negative breast cancer, leading to plans for resuming paused trials in 2026. This positive outlook is based on a recent SEC 8-K filing.

feed.title: Intensity Therapeutics Reports 2025 Year End Financial Results and Highlights, and Provides Corporate Update
feed.summary: Intensity Therapeutics announced its 2025 year-end financial results, highlighting over $20 million raised and a cash runway into Q2 2027. Key corporate updates include favorable efficacy and safety data from the INVINCIBLE-4 Study for triple-negative breast cancer, resumption of enrollment in said study, and the publication of the IT-01 Study manuscript in eBioMedicine showcasing INT230-6's effectiveness in metastatic cancers. The company reported a net loss of $11.6 million for 2025, an improvement from $16.3 million in 2024, attributed to reduced R&D and administrative expenses.

feed.title: [ARS] ENTERGY CORP /DE/ SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC ARS filing by Entergy Corp (ETR) on March 27, 2026, at 04:40 PM. The filing is categorized as low impact and neutral sentiment. It also provides an overview of Entergy's stock performance, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Harrow Raises $50 Million Via Additional 8.625% Senior Notes Due 2030; Signs Purchase Agreement and Indenture
feed.summary: Harrow (HROW) has raised an additional $50 million through the issuance of 8.625% Senior Notes due 2030, in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers and offshore investors. The net proceeds of approximately $48.7 million will be used for general corporate purposes, including growth initiatives and product development. This issuance expands an existing series of notes, facilitated by a Purchase Agreement with BTIG and a First Supplemental Indenture.

feed.title: Coach Tabby Bag: Tapestry's Iconic Luxury Handbag Driving North American Fashion Demand in 2026
feed.summary: The Coach Tabby Bag, a cornerstone of Tapestry's Coach brand, is a key driver of luxury handbag demand in North America for 2026, appealing to professionals and fashion enthusiasts with its blend of vintage-inspired design and modern functionality. Its sustained popularity and contribution to Coach's revenue highlight Tapestry's successful strategy of leveraging heritage designs and adapting to contemporary trends, making Tapestry Inc. an attractive investment in the growing luxury goods sector. The bag's affordability, American craftsmanship, and strategic marketing contribute to its strong market position and investor appeal.

feed.title: Highview 10-K: $0.00 Revenue, $0.17 EPS; net income $3.15M on trust interest
feed.summary: Highview reported no operating revenues for the year, recording $0.00 in revenue but a net income per share of $0.17. The company's net income of $3.15 million primarily stemmed from interest earned on trust investments, offsetting an operating loss of $(0.46) million due to administrative expenses. Highview continues to seek an initial business combination while managing its trust account investments.

feed.title: Heritage Commerce (HTBK) investors approve stock-for-stock merger into CVB Financial
feed.summary: Heritage Commerce Corp shareholders have approved the merger with CVB Financial Corp., with 69.5% of outstanding shares represented and a significant majority voting in favor. Each Heritage share will be exchanged for 0.65 shares of CVB Financial Corp common stock. Both companies anticipate completing the merger in the second quarter of 2026, pending regulatory approvals and remaining closing conditions.

feed.title: [ARS] HIGHWOODS PROPERTIES, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: HIGHWOODS PROPERTIES, INC. (HIW) has filed an ARS form with the SEC. The filing, categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, was accepted on March 27, 2026, at 4:10 PM UTC. The document is available for full review in PDF format on the SEC EDGAR website.

feed.title: HomesToLife (HTLM) schedules 2026 AGM with director votes, auditor ratification and cash dividend
feed.summary: HomesToLife Ltd (HTLM) has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for April 10, 2026, in Singapore to address four key proposals. These proposals include the re-election of five directors, the ratification of CLA Global TS Public Accounting Corporation as the auditor for 2026, and the approval of a final cash dividend of US$0.065 per ordinary share. The board unanimously recommends voting in favor of all proposals, noting that this is the company's first proposed cash dividend, to be funded from expected subsidiary dividends.

feed.title: IB Acquisition Extends SPAC Deadline to Sep 28, 2026 via Trust Agreement Amendment
feed.summary: IB Acquisition (IBAC) has amended its Investment Management Trust Agreement to extend the deadline for completing a business combination by six months, moving it from March 28, 2026, to September 28, 2026. This amendment, made with Continental Stock Transfer & Trust, also outlines liquidation procedures if a deal is not finalized by the new deadline or any subsequent stockholder-approved extension, ensuring trust funds are not used for dissolution expenses. The extension provides additional time to secure a merger while protecting the assets held in trust for stockholders.
